build.beforeBuildCommand: npm run build && bash scripts/stage-node-runtime.sh && bash scripts/stage-sidecar.sh && bash scripts/stage-gallery.sh && bash scripts/stage-rust-server.sh

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: http://127.0.0.1:* asset: http://asset.localhost; connect-src 'self' ws://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* ipc: http://ipc.localhost; frame-src http://127.0.0.1:*; font-src 'self' data:
